choices.text: Every 2,016 blocks (~2 weeks), difficulty auto-adjusts to target 10 min/block. Faster blocks = difficulty up; slower = down. Max change 4× per cycle. Keeps issuance steady regardless of hash rate.

Block reward halves every 210,000 blocks (~4 years). 50 → 25 → 12.5 → 6.25 → 3.125 BTC currently. Reduces new issuance; converges to ~21M total. Historically preceded BTC price rallies due to supply shock.
